# Product Agent v0.1.1 Local Beta

This patch release cleans up first-run noise after the v0.1.0 local beta release.

## Changes

- Added a lightweight GitHub feedback thread link to the README.
- Added a favicon via `src/app/icon.svg` so local dev no longer logs `/favicon.ico` as missing.
- Replaced CSS `start/end` alignment values with `flex-start/flex-end` to remove autoprefixer warnings during `pnpm build`.

## Verify

```bash
pnpm typecheck
node scripts/local-doctor.mjs --json
pnpm build
```
